<aside>
💡 In relation to [The Agency](../../Features/The%20Agency%2044db7ec455e14b10a9bc1da088f20f66.md), more than any fantasy narrative I have ever read, this is consistently a fantasy business.  The protagonist accidentally founds a nation and runs it like I business.
